ticket.subject: Re: Pluginhive x PostNord DO API
ticket.raw_subject: Re: Pluginhive x PostNord DO API
ticket.description:
Hi Emil, 

It was nice connecting with you, and thank you for sharing more information about the Delivery Options API and its benefits. 

This looks very interesting, and we'd like to explore the integration further. Could you also please help us with the sandbox credentials required for testing?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive>

> On 9 Jun 2026, at 11:48 AM, Emil Ellonen, PostNord <emil.ellonen@postnord.com> wrote:
> 
> With PostNord’s Delivery Options API, e-commerce businesses can display more accurate delivery options and delivery times for PostNord services at checkout. The Delivery Options API enables e-commerce checkouts to present precise and up-to-date PostNord delivery options along with estimated delivery times.
> What are the benefits of the DO API for e-commerce?
> 
> The DO API helps improve the customer experience and supports sales by:
> Displaying an estimated delivery day at checkout (e.g. “Delivery on Thursday”)
> * Showing the latest possible delivery time (e.g. “no later than 4 PM”)
> * Displaying only the delivery options that are actually available for the specific shipment
> * Making the checkout clearer and more transparent — which also improves conversion rates
> How to get started with the DO API
> 
> Implementation is straightforward for e-commerce businesses:
> Technical requirements
> The checkout solution must support DO API calls
> or
> * The business can use a platform or partner where the DO API is already supported
> 
> If support is already in place, activation is usually all that’s needed. Otherwise, a lightweight checkout integration is required.
> Required information
> To calculate delivery options and schedules, the e-commerce platform provides the DO API with:
> The shipment’s origin address
> * The time when the shipment is ready for pickup
> * Receiver information
> 
> Based on this information, we can determine:
> Available delivery services
> * Estimated delivery day and the latest delivery time
> More information
> 
> If you’re interested in exploring how the Delivery Options API can enhance your checkout experience, please contact your own contact person or mail tosales.fi@postnord.com <mailto:sales.fi@postnord.com>
> See in our Showroom how an e-commerce checkout can look with the Delivery Options API.
> You will find further information for developers here <https://developer.postnord.com/apis/details?systemName=shipment-v1-deliveryoptions>.
> 
> Kind Regards,
> PostNord Oy |
> 
> 
> ________________________________________________________________________________

comments.html_body:
Hi Emil, 

It was nice connecting with you, and thank you for sharing more information about the Delivery Options API and its benefits. 

This looks very interesting, and we'd like to explore the integration further. Could you also please help us with the sandbox credentials required for testing?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

On 9 Jun 2026, at 11:48 AM, Emil Ellonen, PostNord <emil.ellonen@postnord.com> wrote:

With PostNord’s Delivery Options API, e-commerce businesses can display more accurate delivery options and delivery times for PostNord services at checkout. The Delivery Options API enables e-commerce checkouts to present precise and up-to-date PostNord delivery options along with estimated delivery times.
What are the benefits of the DO API for e-commerce?

The DO API helps improve the customer experience and supports sales by:
  • Displaying an estimated delivery day at checkout (e.g. “Delivery on Thursday”)
    * Showing the latest possible delivery time (e.g. “no later than 4 PM”)
    * Displaying only the delivery options that are actually available for the specific shipment
    * Making the checkout clearer and more transparent — which also improves conversion rates
How to get started with the DO API

Implementation is straightforward for e-commerce businesses:
Technical requirements
  • The checkout solution must support DO API calls
    or
    * The business can use a platform or partner where the DO API is already supported

    If support is already in place, activation is usually all that’s needed. Otherwise, a lightweight checkout integration is required.
    Required information
    To calculate delivery options and schedules, the e-commerce platform provides the DO API with:
  • The shipment’s origin address
    * The time when the shipment is ready for pickup
    * Receiver information

    Based on this information, we can determine:
  • Available delivery services
    * Estimated delivery day and the latest delivery time
More information

If you’re interested in exploring how the Delivery Options API can enhance your checkout experience, please contact your own contact person or mail tosales.fi@postnord.com
See in our Showroom how an e-commerce checkout can look with the Delivery Options API.
You will find further information for developers here.

Kind Regards,
PostNord Oy |

Hi Emil,  
  It was nice connecting with you, and thank you for sharing more information about the Delivery Options API and its benefits.   
  This looks very interesting, and we'd like to explore the integration further. Could you also please help us with the sandbox credentials required for testing?  
  Looking forward to hearing from you.   
 
 Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn 
 
 
  On 9 Jun 2026, at 11:48 AM, Emil Ellonen, PostNord <emil.ellonen@postnord.com> wrote: 
  

 
 




 
With PostNord’s Delivery Options API, e-commerce businesses can display more accurate delivery options and delivery times for PostNord services at checkout. The Delivery Options API enables e-commerce checkouts to present precise and up-to-date PostNord
 delivery options along with estimated delivery times. 
 
What are the benefits of the DO API for e-commerce? 
 


The DO API helps improve the customer experience and supports sales by: 
 
 
Displaying an estimated delivery day at checkout (e.g. “Delivery on Thursday”)

* Showing the latest possible delivery time (e.g. “no later than 4 PM”)

* Displaying only the delivery options that are actually available for the specific shipment

* Making the checkout clearer and more transparent — which also improves conversion rates

  




 
 
How to get started with the DO API 
 


Implementation is straightforward for e-commerce businesses:

Technical requirements 
 
 
The checkout solution must support DO API calls

or

* The business can use a platform or partner where the DO API is already supported



If support is already in place, activation is usually all that’s needed. Otherwise, a lightweight checkout integration is required.

Required information

To calculate delivery options and schedules, the e-commerce platform provides the DO API with:  
The shipment’s origin address

* The time when the shipment is ready for pickup

* Receiver information



Based on this information, we can determine:  
Available delivery services

* Estimated delivery day and the latest delivery time

  
 
More information 
 


If you’re interested in exploring how the Delivery Options API can enhance your checkout experience, please contact your own contact person or mail tosales.fi@postnord.com

See in our Showroom how an e-commerce checkout can look with the Delivery Options API.

You will find further information for developers here.



Kind Regards,

PostNord Oy |

comments.body:
Hi Team,

I recently spoke with PostNord regarding their Delivery Options (DO) API, which allows merchants to display real-time delivery options, estimated delivery dates, and delivery time windows during checkout.

Currently, we do not support this functionality in our PostNord integration. PostNord considers this an important feature for improving checkout transparency and conversion rates.

I've attached the API documentation link and a sample checkout/showroom link shared by PostNord to help you better understand how the feature works and how it is presented to customers.

Could we evaluate adding support for the DO API to our PostNord integration roadmap? Please let me know your thoughts on the feasibility and estimated effort involved.

Also, PostNord mentioned that their Rating API is still under development and is expected to go live in the future. There is currently no ETA available from their side.

API Document - https://developer.postnord.com/apis/details/JSnCs4sBlU06aKgBaOHN
Sample Checkout Flow (Staging)- https://checkout-showroom.postnord.com/dev

(Abhilash)

Currently, we do not support this functionality in our PostNord integration. PostNord considers this an important feature for improving checkout transparency and conversion rates.
 
I've attached the API documentation link and a sample checkout/showroom link shared by PostNord to help you better understand how the feature works and how it is presented to customers.
 
Could we evaluate adding support for the DO API to our PostNord integration roadmap? Please let me know your thoughts on the feasibility and estimated effort involved.
 
Also, PostNord mentioned that their Rating API is still under development and is expected to go live in the future. There is currently no ETA available from their side.
 
API Document - https://developer.postnord.com/apis/details/JSnCs4sBlU06aKgBaOHN 
Sample Checkout Flow (Staging)- https://checkout-showroom.postnord.com/dev
 
(Abhilash)
